codeReview.summary: The commit cleanly hardens VAL-INDEX-003 test behavior by making assertions deterministic against ProjectionPipelineService sweep semantics. Coverage now explicitly verifies stale-only gap repair reproject behavior and no-op behavior when all conversations are current, matching the feature description and expected behavior.

sharedStateObservations.observation: runSweep semantics that matter for deterministic tests (gap-repair enqueue + processing in the same sweep, plus initial backfill rebuild side-effects) are not explicitly captured in shared architecture/testing docs, even though they directly affect assertion strategy.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff salientSummary calls out both behaviors; test comments codify this at AgentLensTests/Active/ProjectionPipelineServiceTests.swift:355, :417, :497.

summary: Reviewed transcript skeleton, handoff, skill alignment, and commit 3a3143a. Implementation satisfies the feature’s deterministic gap-repair testing goals with no actionable code defects identified.
